info.name: Local Whisper Speech To Text
info.summary: A Local Whisper implementation for Speech To Text
info.description:
**Requires [`AppAPI`](https://github.com/cloud-py-api/app_api) to work.**
Read the Documentation: https://docs.nextcloud.com/server/latest/admin_manual/ai/app_stt_whisper2.html
## Ethical AI Rating ### Rating: 🟡
Positive: * the software for training and inference of this model is open source * the trained model is freely available, and thus can be run on-premises
Negative: * the training data is not freely available, limiting the ability of external parties to check and correct for bias or optimise the model’s performance and CO2 usage.
Learn more about the Nextcloud Ethical AI Rating [in our blog](https://nextcloud.com/blog/nextcloud-ethical-ai-rating/).
info.author: Marcel Klehr
Alexander Piskun

variable.name: STT_WHISPER2_VAD_FILTER
variable.description: Set to 1 to only transcribe audio parts that pass the voice activity filter. This helps reduce hallucinations on long audio files. Default: 1

variable.name: STT_WHISPER2_VAD_THRESHOLD
variable.description: The threshold for the VAD filter. Must be a float between 0 and 1. Default: 0.5

variable.name: STT_WHISPER2_VAD_MIN_SPEECH_MS
variable.display-name: Voice Activity Detection filter minimum speech milliseconds
variable.description: The minimum time of speech that activates the VAD filter, as an integer. Default: 0

variable.name: STT_WHISPER2_VAD_MIN_SILENCE_MS
variable.display-name: Voice Activity Detection filter minimum silence milliseconds
variable.description: The minimum time of silence that deactivates the VAD filter, as an integer. Default: 2000

variable.name: STT_WHISPER2_VAD_SPEECH_PAD_MS
variable.display-name: Voice Activity Detection filter speech pad milliseconds
variable.description: The time that speech chunks will be paded with silence by the VAD filter, as an integer. Default: 400
